name: VibeCast Xenosphere Swarm
description: Multi-agent swarm building four exotic future systems in parallel

agents.focus: Build complete hyperdimensional data encoding system with temporal database and holographic storage
tasks: Complete hypervector implementation with all operations (bind, bundle, permute)
Implement temporal database with time as storage dimension
Create holographic data distribution with graceful degradation
Build fuzzy retrieval and associative memory systems
Add vector similarity clustering and cleanup operations
Create examples showing 4D+ encoding in action

agents.focus: Implement stigmergic coordination with pheromone trails and emergent structures
tasks: Complete pheromone map with all trail types
Implement trail decay and reinforcement mechanics
Build emergent convergence detection
Create swarm coordination engine
Add visualizations of emergent pathways
Implement real-time stigmergic collaboration API

agents.focus: Build chrono-adaptive content engine with astronomical awareness
tasks: Implement lunar cycle calculations and tracking
Add solar activity monitoring and prediction
Create circadian rhythm integration
Build follow-the-sun compute migration
Implement AI personality that shifts with time/astronomy
Add energy optimization based on planetary rotation
Create seasonal AI behaviors

agents.focus: Create biodata streaming protocols with emotional topology mapping
tasks: Implement biometric data ingestion (HRV, EEG, GSR simulation)
Build collective physiological aggregation
Create emotional topology mapper
Implement group coherence detection
Build adaptive content modulation based on biometrics
Add real-time synchronization visualizations

agents.focus: Integrate all four exotic systems into unified platform
tasks: Create core integration layer
Build unified API across all systems
Implement inter-system communication
Create holistic streaming platform
Add monitoring and observability
Build demo application showing all systems working together

philosophy.approach: Build the future - 50 years ahead, practical today
principles: No central control - pure swarm intelligence
Each agent specializes but contributes to the whole
Holographic integration - every part knows about the whole
